questionHtml: State one assumption that the driving school makes in using this model.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER
the outcomes of the test are independent of each other          A1
OR
the probability is constant          A1

 

Note: Do not accept “60% will pass”. Accept “all students have the same probability of passing the test”.

 

OR
there are only two possible outcomes          A1

 

Note: The number of trials is given in the question, and is NOT an assumption.

Do not accept:
“All students have the same driving ability”
“The driving conditions are the same”
“All tests are done on sunny days and there is no rain”
“The instructors are fair” etc.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one assumption that the driving school makes in using this model.
